bank.retain_mission: Extract Roblox experience-design decisions, systems-scripting patterns, and avatar-creation conventions.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about target experiences, monetization structure, scripting conventions (Luau), and avatar pipeline. Ignore one-off place tweaks.

mental_models.name: Experience Design
mental_models.source_query: What kind of Roblox experiences are we building, and how is monetization and retention structured?

mental_models.name: Scripting Conventions
mental_models.source_query: What Luau scripting conventions and module patterns work for this studio?
